title: Timber
description: Timber: Structural timber material to be used on structural elements and properties or as a fragment of the physical material.

Name.description: Name. A unique name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

DensityCharacteristic.description: Characteristic Density. Used to calculate other mechanical properties (not mass). Called G (specific gravity) in American codes, p_k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

Density.description: Mean Density. Used to calculate mass. Called p_mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic Damping Ratio. Ratio between actual damping and critical damping. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

YoungsModulus.description: Characteristic Modulus Of Elasticity of the material. Ratio between stress and strain in all directions. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel, E_0,k in Eurocode; Y - Perpendicular, E_90,k in Eurocode; Z - Perpendicular, E_90,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

YoungsModulusMean.description: Mean Modulus Of Elasticity of the material. Ratio between stress and strain in all directions. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel, E_0,mean in Eurocode; Y - Perpendicular, E_90,mean in Eurocode; Z - Perpendicular, E_90,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

PoissonsRatio.description: Poisson's Ratio. Ratio between axial and transverse strain. Typically take as 0.4 in all directions, though value varies depending on timber species. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel; Y - Perpendicular; Z - Perpendicular. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ThermalExpansionCoeff.description: Thermal Expansion Coefficeint. Strain induced in the material per unit change of temperature. Typically take as 5x10^-6 in all directions, though value varies depending on timber species. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel; Y - Perpendicular; Z - Perpendicular. Property has a quantity of type ThermalExpansionCoefficient measured in [1/K]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ShearModulus.description: Characterstic Shear Modulus or Modulus of Rigidity. Ratio between shear stress and shear strain. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel, G_k in Eurocode; Y - Parallel, G_k in Eurocode; Z - Perpendicular, G_r,05 in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ShearModulusMean.description: Mean Shear Modulus or Modulus of Rigidity. Ratio between shear stress and shear strain. Vector components made up of: X - Parallel, G_mean in Eurocode; Y - Parallel, G_mean in Eurocode; Z - Perpendicular, G_r,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

BendingStrength.description: Bending Strength. Tension stress parallel to the grain at failure in bending as calculated from beam equations. Called F_b in American codes, f_mk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensionParallelStrength.description: Tension Parallel Strength. Tension stress parallel to the grain at failure in net tension. Called F_t∥ in American codes, f_t0k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensionPerpendicularStrength.description: Tension Perpendicular Strength. Tension stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net tension. Called F_t⟂ in American codes, f_t90k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressionParallelStrength.description: Compression Parallel Strength. Compression stress parallel to the grain at failure in net compression. Called F_c∥ in American codes, f_c0k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressionPerpendicularStrength.description: Compression Perpendicular Strength. Compression stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net compression. Called F_c⟂ in American codes, f_c90k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ShearStrength.description: Shear Strength. Shear stress parallel to the grain at failure in net shear, i.e. shear relevant to beam bending. Called F_v in American codes, f_vk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

RollingShearStrength.description: Rolling Shear Strength. Shear stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net shear. Called F_s in American codes, F_rk in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
